rules.title: Clinical thresholds must come from config.py
rules.description: No hardcoded clinical values (heart rate thresholds, HRV norms, SpO2 limits) in analysis/ files. All must reference config.py constants.

rules.title: No hardcoded p-values in HTML
rules.description: P-values in HTML must be read from the JSON metrics dict, never hardcoded as string literals. Every statistical claim must have a JSON source.

rules.title: Every statistical test must include effect size
rules.description: Mann-Whitney, t-test, and CausalImpact results must include Cohen's d or equivalent effect size alongside p-values.

rules.title: All dates must come from config.py
rules.description: No hardcoded date strings like '2026-03-16' or '2026-02-09' in analysis scripts. Use TREATMENT_START, KNOWN_EVENT_DATE, etc. from config.

rules.title: Database path from config only
rules.description: Never hardcode database paths. Always use DATABASE_PATH from config.py.

rules.title: Filter SpO2 sentinel values
rules.description: oura_spo2 table has spo2_average=0.0 sentinels. Always filter WHERE spo2_average > 0 or equivalent.
